# plan-product output template

Use this structure when the task needs a more formal planning artifact.

## Summary

One short paragraph describing the request.

## User value

Who benefits and what improves.

## In scope

- Item
- Item

## Out of scope

- Item
- Item

## Constraints and assumptions

- Constraint or assumption
- Constraint or assumption

## Acceptance criteria

- Observable outcome
- Observable outcome

## Open questions

- Question
- Question
